versions.version_description: Revised and simplified chord structure, capo retains song's original key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Hi. This is my interpretation of the song, and it should be pretty accurate. If you have any corrections for 
this tab, i would be happy to hear from you.

NOTE: Right before the last chorus, the song changes its key note a half step up, from A to A#.
      Therefore, in order to play the song correctly, you have to move the capo quickly from the 2 fret
      to the third fret. If you strum the last chord of the bridge just once, you should get enough time 
      to move the capo before the last chorus starts. 

Artist: Savage Garden
Song: I Knew i Loved You

Capo: 2 Fret
Tuning: Standard (EADGBe)

Chords:

[ch]G[/ch]:          320033
[ch]A7sus4[/ch]:     X02233
[ch]Bmadd11[/ch](#5) X22433
[ch]Cadd9[/ch]:      X32033
[ch]Em7[/ch]:        022033
[ch]Dsus4[/ch]:      XX0233
[ch]Bm[/ch]:         X24432
[ch]Em[/ch]:         022000
[ch]F#m[/ch]:        244222


[Intro]

[tab]e|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
B|--------------------------------5--7--8-----8--7-----7--5----3-------------|
G|---4--5--7--7-----7--5-----7-------------7--------5------------------------|
D|---------------5--------5----7---------------------------------------------|
A|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|[/tab]

Alternatively, the intro can be played like this: [ch]G[/ch], [ch]A7sus4[/ch], [ch]Bmadd11[/ch], [ch]Cadd9[/ch], [ch]Em7[/ch], [ch]Dsus4[/ch], [ch]Cadd9[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Bmadd11[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Maybe it's intuition[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]A7sus4[/ch]    [ch]Bmadd11[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
But some things you just don't question[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]A7sus4[/ch]      [ch]Bmadd11[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Like in your eyes, I see my future in an instant[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
And there it goes,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I think I found my best friend[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bmadd11[/ch]
I know that it might sound[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
More than a little crazy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
But I believe...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I think I dreamed you into life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A7sus4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch] 
I have been waiting all my life[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Bmadd11[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 There's just no rhyme or reason[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A7sus4[/ch]    [ch]Bmadd11[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Only the sense of completion[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
And in your eyes, I see[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Bmadd11[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
The missing pieces I'm searching for[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I think I've found my way home[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Bmadd11[/ch]
I know that it might sound[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
More than a little crazy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
But I believe...[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I think I dreamed you into life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A7sus4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch] 
I have been waiting all my life[/tab]


[Bridge]

Strum these chords: [ch]Bm[/ch], [ch]Cadd9[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]Em[/ch], [ch]Cadd9[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]F#m[/ch], [ch]Bm[/ch], [ch]Cadd9[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]Em[/ch], [ch]Dsus4[/ch], [ch]Cadd9[/ch]


A thousand angels dance around you

I am complete now that I've found you

[NOTE: This is where you should move capo to 3rd Fret]


[Chorus]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I think I dreamed you into life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A7sus4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch] 
I have been waiting all my life[/tab]


[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I think I dreamed you into life[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]A7sus4[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
I knew I loved you before I met you[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A7sus4[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch] 
I have been waiting all my life[/tab]

(Continue till fade)
